sql_query.query: WITH caller AS (SELECT u.id, u.organization_id, u.name, u.role FROM users u JOIN organizations o ON o.id = u.organization_id AND o.active = TRUE WHERE u.id = $1 AND u.organization_id = $2 AND u.role = $3 AND u.role IN ('finance', 'admin') AND u.active = TRUE), candidate AS (SELECT s.id, s.organization_id, s.learner_id, s.milestone_id, m.amount, c.currency, learner.paystack_recipient_code, payout_step.id AS payout_step_id FROM submissions s JOIN milestones m ON m.id = s.milestone_id AND m.organization_id = s.organization_id JOIN cohorts c ON c.id = m.cohort_id AND c.organization_id = s.organization_id JOIN users learner ON learner.id = s.learner_id AND learner.organization_id = s.organization_id AND learner.active = TRUE JOIN caller ca ON ca.organization_id = s.organization_id JOIN LATERAL (SELECT ws.id FROM workflow_steps ws WHERE ws.organization_id = s.organization_id AND ws.cohort_id = m.cohort_id AND ws.active = TRUE AND ws.step_type = 'payout' AND ws.role = 'system' ORDER BY ws.position LIMIT 1) payout_step ON TRUE WHERE s.id = $4 AND s.status = 'awaiting_finance' AND learner.paystack_recipient_code LIKE 'RCP_%' AND $5 LIKE 'sk_test_%' AND $5 NOT LIKE 'sk_live_%' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM payouts existing WHERE existing.organization_id = s.organization_id AND existing.submission_id = s.id AND existing.status IN ('queued', 'processing', 'paid'))), locked AS (UPDATE submissions s SET status = 'processing', current_step_id = c.payout_step_id, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM candidate c WHERE s.id = c.id AND s.organization_id = c.organization_id AND s.status = 'awaiting_finance' RETURNING s.*, c.amount, c.currency), created AS (INSERT INTO payouts (organization_id, submission_id, learner_id, amount, currency, provider, provider_reference, status, approved_at, paid_at, created_at, updated_at) SELECT l.organization_id, l.id, l.learner_id, l.amount, l.currency, 'paystack-test', concat('msr_test_', replace($6, '-', '')), 'processing', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM locked l RETURNING *), audited AS (INSERT INTO audit_events (organization_id, submission_id, actor_id, actor_name, actor_role, event_type, event_key, title, detail, metadata, created_at) SELECT p.organization_id, p.submission_id, ca.id, ca.name, ca.role, e.event_type, concat(e.event_type, ':', p.id), e.title, e.detail, jsonb_build_object('providerReference', p.provider_reference, 'status', p.status), p.created_at FROM created p CROSS JOIN caller ca CROSS JOIN LATERAL (VALUES ('finance_approved', 'Stipend authorized', 'Eligibility, recipient, and budget checks passed.'), ('payout_queued', 'Test payout queued', 'Sub0 queued a Paystack test-mode transfer with retries.')) e(event_type, title, detail) RETURNING id) SELECT p.id, p.submission_id AS "submissionId", p.learner_id AS "learnerId", learner.name AS "learnerName", m.title AS "milestoneTitle", p.amount, p.currency, p.provider, p.provider_reference AS "providerReference", p.status, p.approved_at::text AS "approvedAt", p.paid_at::text AS "paidAt" FROM created p JOIN submissions s ON s.id = p.submission_id AND s.organization_id = p.organization_id JOIN milestones m ON m.id = s.milestone_id AND m.organization_id = p.organization_id JOIN users learner ON learner.id = p.learner_id AND learner.organization_id = p.organization_id JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) AS audit_count FROM audited) audit_guard ON audit_guard.audit_count = 2

SELECT (p.amount * 100)::bigint AS "amountKobo", learner.paystack_recipient_code AS "recipientCode", p.provider_reference AS "providerReference", concat('MilestoneRail test stipend: ', m.title) AS "transferReason" FROM payouts p JOIN submissions s ON s.id = p.submission_id AND s.organization_id = p.organization_id JOIN milestones m ON m.id = s.milestone_id AND m.organization_id = p.organization_id JOIN users learner ON learner.id = p.learner_id AND learner.organization_id = p.organization_id AND learner.active = TRUE JOIN users caller ON caller.id = $1 AND caller.organization_id = $2 AND caller.role = $3 AND caller.role IN ('finance', 'admin') AND caller.active = TRUE JOIN organizations o ON o.id = caller.organization_id AND o.active = TRUE WHERE p.organization_id = caller.organization_id AND p.submission_id = $4 AND p.provider = 'paystack-test' AND p.status = 'processing' AND learner.paystack_recipient_code LIKE 'RCP_%' AND $5 LIKE 'sk_test_%' AND $5 NOT LIKE 'sk_live_%' ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
